fields.name: Dimension Code
fields.tooltip:
Contains the code for the dimension that the dimension value belongs to.
The Map-to Dimension Code field contains the code of the dimension in your company that corresponds to this intercompany dimension code.

fields.name: Dimension Value Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the intercompany dimension value type.

fields.name: Blocked
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the related record is blocked from being posted in transactions, for example a customer that is declared insolvent or an item that is placed in quarantine.

fields.name: Map-to Dimension Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the dimension code associated with the corresponding intercompany dimension.

fields.name: Map-to Dimension Value Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies which dimension value corresponds to the intercompany dimension value on the line.

fields.name: Indentation
fields.tooltip:
Specifies how many spaces the text field for the dimension value is indented relative to the standard margin.
The field is filled in automatically when you click Actions, point to Functions, and then click Indent IC Dimension Values.
You can enter something in the field, but the contents will be replaced the next time you click Indent IC Dimension Values. Therefore, if you want a bigger indentation, add blank spaces with the spacebar before you enter the text.
